form.formComment: Continued winning form with another impressive display to make it two in a row at this track over 455m (25.67). With even luck looks hard to beat again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Continued winning form with another impressive display to make it two in a row at this track over 455m (25.67). With even luck looks hard to beat again.

form.formComment: Hit the frame latest (29.54) when second at Mt Gambier in a Grade 4/5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and seven places from 13 starts. Expected to be in the finish.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the frame latest (29.54) when second at Mt Gambier in a Grade 4/5. Goes very well from the draw boasting two victories and seven places from 13 starts. Expected to be in the finish.

form.formComment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 732m at Mt Gambier in a handy (43.11), beating Compton Rocky. Ran the fastest time on the program in the latest win. Worth following up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort to win last start by 1.3 lengths over 732m at Mt Gambier in a handy (43.11), beating Compton Rocky. Ran the fastest time on the program in the latest win. Worth following up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked turn out of home straight.
Checked turn into home straight first occasion.

form.formComment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Angle Park over 530m. Racing well and has to be included.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has finished fifth at her last couple of starts, most recently at Angle Park over 530m. Racing well and has to be included.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked shortly after start; Checked first turn; Checked back straight.

form.formComment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (43.99) at Angle Park, making it two placings on end. Squeeze draw to overcome. Others preferred.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Finished in the minors at big odds last time when third (43.99) at Angle Park, making it two placings on end. Squeeze draw to overcome. Others preferred.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked then raced wide first turn; Raced wide back straight.

form.formComment: Last start finished last over 595m at Angle Park beaten 14 lengths (35.44) behind Isabella's Blitz in a Grade 5/6 on April 6. Expected to go very well.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start finished last over 595m at Angle Park beaten 14 lengths (35.44) behind Isabella's Blitz in a Grade 5/6 on April 6. Expected to go very well.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Went up with lids; Checked turn into back straight.

form.formComment: Has been racing well and scored a good win last start at Gawler on April 5 over 531m in 30.92. Not suited by the wide draw; Likely to struggle this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has been racing well and scored a good win last start at Gawler on April 5 over 531m in 30.92. Not suited by the wide draw; Likely to struggle this time.

form.formComment: Was out of the placings last time at Mt Gambier but prior to that had been racing consistently, notching three minors in a row. Boxed out wide and looks safely held.
